narrative:
German Twp township has 4,585 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.3 percentage points.
